name: gazzumatteo-claude-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins and skills by Matteo Gazzurelli — testing, automation, and productivity tools for NQL and beyond

plugins.name: e2e-testing
plugins.description: End-to-end testing workflow: create checklists from code, validate them against changes, and execute via Playwright. Structured markdown + JSON reports.

plugins.name: code-optimizer
plugins.description: Scan, plan, apply, and verify code optimizations across 11 categories (dedup, type consolidation, dead code, cycles, type strengthening, error handling, AI-slop, complexity, magic constants, naming, excessive parameters). Multi-language (TS/JS, Python, generic). Regression-safe via baseline + per-batch rollback.
